channel.title: Finance
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Finance, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Current price of oil as of April 23, 2026
item.description: When oil prices change, it affects your energy costs—and even the price of everyday items. Here’s why.

item.title: Inflated AI claims are under fire—and the regulatory reckoning is coming
item.description: A top securities litigation partner at Baker McKenzie argues that history—from dot-com fraud to ESG greenwashing—tells us exactly where AI disclosure ...

item.title: Here’s Everything The New ‘Crimson Desert’ Patch Just Broke
item.description: Crimson Desert just rolled out its biggest patch ever, but it broke a whole lot of important things in the game. Here's a list.

item.title: The AI Paradox: Why World-Class Algorithms Fail On Second-Class Data
item.description: In 2026, tech leaders are learning a painful lesson: the problem with scaling AI adoption isn't understanding the algorithm, it's the data you put int...

item.title: Quordle Hints Today: Friday, April 24 Clues And Answers
item.description: Looking for some help with today’s Quordle words? Some hints and the answers are right here to give you a hand.

item.title: Your Period, Your Proteins, Your Health
item.description: Nearly 200 blood proteins rise and fall across the menstrual cycle, enabling a test that pinpoints cycle day and links it to risks like fibroids and h...

item.title: The Iran War just made the clean energy transition non-negotiable
item.description: I've spent 20 years making the economic case for clean energy. Hormuz just made the geopolitical case — at the cost of many lives and $126-a-barrel oi...

item.title: Goldman tackles AI’s missing link: the ‘world model’ that every AI godfather is racing to figure out
item.description: The researchers who built modern AI say it's still missing something fundamental. Goldman Sachs explains what—and why the answer could reshape everyth...

item.title: Stephen and Ayesha Curry talk about the one habit that separates good business leaders from great ones
item.description: The Currys, co-founders of Plezi Hydration, discuss leading with purpose.

item.title: ‘Halo’ Is Reportedly Threatening To Make An Extraction Shooter
item.description: According to a new report, some form of a Halo extraction shooter may be in the works after a previous battle royale was cancelled.

item.title: Stocks open lower as S&P 500 retreats from record amid Strait of Hormuz tensions
Economic calendar: Jobless claims and manufacturing data
Why it’s the luckiest U.S. stock market in history, according to one strategist
TI stock rallies as company cites industrial and data-center demand
Energy stocks lead 2026 gains. Why Iran war may erode the rally.
Bessent torches Democrat's ‘sanctions relief’ claims, calls $14B Iran/Russia charge a DNC talking point
item.description: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent and Sen. Chris Coons clash over claims that Iran gained $14 billion from temporary U.S. sanctions relief on oil.

item.title: Who is Kevin Warsh, Trump's pick to succeed Jerome Powell as Fed chair?
item.description: President Donald Trump nominated former Federal Reserve Governor Kevin Warsh at the end of January to become chairman of the central bank.

item.title: How does Fed chair nominee Kevin Warsh view the central bank's inflation goal?
item.description: Fed chair nominee Kevin Warsh is testifying before the Senate Banking Committee and has previously signaled support for a range-based approach to infl...

item.title: Trump says he wants 'somebody' to buy Spirit Airlines, opposes United-American merger
item.description: President Donald Trump says he wants someone to buy Spirit Airlines as the low-cost carrier battles bankruptcy and rising fuel costs threaten its reco...

item.title: DOJ reportedly pursuing criminal antitrust probe of major meatpacking companies
item.description: The DOJ is reportedly investigating four major beef companies in a criminal antitrust probe after Trump claimed meatpackers manipulated cattle prices.

item.title: What to Know About China's DeepSeek AI
item.description: The Chinese upstart says it has trained high-performing AI models cheaply, without using the most advanced chips.

item.title: Tech, Media & Telecom Roundup: Market Talk
item.description: DeepSeek, SoFi and more in the latest Market Talks covering Technology, Media and Telecom.

item.title: Silicon Valley Is Raving About a Made-in-China AI Model
item.description: DeepSeek is called “amazing and impressive” despite working with less-advanced chips.

item.title: Reid Hoffman Raises $24.6 Million for AI Cancer-Research Startup
item.description: The LinkedIn co-founder is starting Manas AI with “The Emperor of All Maladies” author Siddhartha Mukherjee.

item.title: Can an App Replace a Personal Trainer? I Tested Nearly a Dozen to Find Out
item.description: Apps can add flexibility and freshness to your routine. Just try not to get injured.
